reviews.review_msg: Great prof for second languagers. He's not native too so for the very 1st time, I can understand almost 90% of what the prof says. Very simple words and grammar but CLEAR message during class, no matter how the speed could be. Might not give you very positive feedbacks if he doesn't favor the answers you give for in-class questions / discussions.

He is really nice professor ever. Not only marketing stuff, but you can also learn some life experiences based on what he talked in lecture. I really enjoyed to study with him. Participations is not required in his lecture but it is great to go and listen. I promise you that you will definitely learn lots of things from his lecture.
After taking his course, I decided to specialize in marketing. His excellent examples and lectures were the best I've had in Beedie. I highly recommend taking his classes.
His exam is really hard to take with! Avoid please.......
His powerpoint slides are clear, but I think he still need to improve the teaching style by first time to teach for this course!
Rui knows a lot about the subject matter. His experience and cases are amazing. I wish more profs teach like Rui. He only uses his own cases in class and they are so interesting

Rui was a really good prof, one of the best ones of Beedie. His lectures were amazing, I was locked in the entire 3 hours. He's really engaging and uses real world examples sos you understand the concepts. His exams were fair as well as the presentation.
Typically uses real-world examples which helps give meaning as to why we're learning these things. Easy to approach and ask questions. Great prof overall

THis is a work hard get A class. He is really open to questions and friendly. Participation makes a difference and make you stand out. Take notes during case study lectures. Great prof to ask for reference if you get A range. He gave me a reference letter for master application, as I got A- and participated so he knows me. got into dream school
